subcodes.first_line: O cherished handmaiden of the Ancient Beauty, respected leaf! Praise be to God, under the protection and safeguard of an esteemed person [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز جمال قدم ورقه محترمه الحمد لله در تحت عصمت و عفت شخصی محترمی که
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude
